name: T1 Glass-Ceiling Push 2026-05-13 Slot A pre-registration

formula_payload.experiment: T1 Glass-Ceiling Push 2026-05-13 Slot A — 7-item-no-13 chain + CCC-descending fixed order
formula_payload.tri_cli_consult_synthesis: codex+gemini priors 0.03-0.12 on screen pass; gemini surfaced CCC-descending ordering as mechanism enhancement

cohort.filter: PD with full items 9-14, 15, 18 (iter34 hygiene-corrected cohort N=92)

model_ensemble: RegressorChain(XGBRegressor hist, n=500, lr=0.05, depth=4, min_child=5)
stage2.ensemble_method: average chain-output across 3 bases per fold per seed
stage2.item_13_handling: dropped from chain training; replaced by train_fold_mean(item_13) in T1 sum reconstruction

eval.headline_metric: CCC of mean-of-3-seed predictions vs y_t1
eval.screen_gate: 5-fold Δ̄ vs iter34 hybrid ≥ +0.020 AND seed std < 0.020
eval.loocv_gate: paired bootstrap frac>0 ≥ 0.9875 vs iter34 hybrid on N=92 AND vs iter12-honest on N=92

leakage_assertions: Stage-1 Ridge fit fold-local on train indices only
feature_select_fold operates on outer-train labels only
impute_fold operates on outer-train values only
item-13 train_fold_mean computed inside each outer fold
no global imputers, no cohort-wide z-scoring, no pre-computed ranks
